title: spook's setup
description: My personal modpack that focuses on enhancing Minecraft's performance, ambiance, and sound design while staying true to vanilla!
body:
![spook's setup banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bba41e47235f995c89a1ea79f13e6ae6e8670e2f.png)

## [Latest version: v2.0.1 - Made for Minecraft 26.1.2]
### spook's setup is a compilation of the mods heyimspook uses while playing Minecraft. This pack contains mods that improve Minecraft's overall performance in single-player and multiplayer and additionally contains aesthetic mods that make the game prettier. 
### 
Additionally, this modpack is different from other performance-enhancing modpacks because it also focuses on sound design, improving in-game ambiance and environments with sound physics, per-biome and time-of-day unique sounds, and enhanced material-based footstep sounds. 

Download this pack for better performance, a more beautiful gameplay experience, and enhanced sound design while keeping things vanilla.
